hero.title: Privacy Policy – UltraTech
hero.effective: Effective: From the moment of use

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
items: The Site collects minimal information only:
Email address for service and support purposes
Information submitted by the user in the digital business card
Site usage information via cookies and analytics systems (e.g., Google Analytics)
The Site does not collect any additional information without the user’s consent.

usage.title: 2. Use of Information
items: Collected information is used solely to provide services, support the user, and improve user experience.
The Site will not sell, rent, or share personal information with third parties without explicit consent, except as required by law.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
items: The Site takes reasonable security measures, including encryption, to protect personal information.
Information is retained as long as the account is active or as required by law.

rights.title: 4. User Rights
items: Users may contact info@ultratech.co.il to:
Access their personal information
Correct inaccurate information
Delete personal information
The Site will respond to such requests in accordance with Israeli privacy laws.

age.title: 5. Age Restriction
items: The Site is intended for users 18 years and older only.
Minors are not allowed to use the Site.

changes.title: 6. Policy Changes
items: The Site may update the Privacy Policy from time to time.
Changes will be published on the Site, and continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

law.title: 7. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
items: The Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of the State of Israel.
Any dispute will be subject to the competent courts in Tel Aviv, Israel.
